evidence: plugin.json contains no 'skills' key; skills/pentest/SKILL.md is present on disk
description: Plugin manifest missing 'skills' array; pentest skill on disk is not registered and will not be loaded by the Claude Code plugin system

evidence: run_native calls subprocess.run(['bash', '-lc', full]) where full = f"{prefix}{command}" and command = f"{cmds[0]} {args.args}" with args.args being the user-supplied --args value
description: User-supplied --args are concatenated unquoted into a shell command string executed via bash -lc; target hostnames or other user data containing shell metacharacters enable command injection
suggested_fix: Apply shlex.quote() to each user-supplied token in --args, or validate that the string contains only safe characters before interpolation into the command string

evidence: run_native prepends 'sudo -n ' to command at line 204; auto-retry block at lines 386-393 re-runs any permission_denied failure with sudo without per-invocation user consent
description: Automatic privilege escalation via sudo -n on any permission_denied error; tools that fail for unrelated reasons could silently gain elevated privileges
suggested_fix: Require an explicit --allow-sudo flag per invocation rather than auto-escalating on permission_denied classification

description: --docker-image argument value is written directly into DOCKER_IMAGE_OVERRIDES without allowlist validation; an attacker-controlled image name could execute a malicious container
suggested_fix: Validate --docker-image against the known DOCKER_IMAGE_OVERRIDES values or an explicit allowlist before accepting the override

evidence: socket.create_connection(("1.1.1.1", 443), timeout=3) at line 44 is unconditional on every preflight run
description: Preflight makes an undisclosed outbound TCP connection to hardcoded Cloudflare IP 1.1.1.1:443 on every session start; not documented to users
suggested_fix: Make the connectivity check target configurable via environment variable, or document the outbound connection in the plugin README and SKILL.md preflight description

description: --output argument allows writing tools.json to any filesystem path; risk is limited because ht_index.py is a developer build tool not invoked by the skill at runtime
suggested_fix: Validate that the resolved --output path is within the plugin directory tree before writing

evidence: plugin.json has no 'skills' key; skills/pentest/SKILL.md exists at that path on disk
description: SKILL.md is not declared in plugin.json and will not be auto-loaded by the Claude Code plugin system on install
suggested_fix: Add skills array to plugin.json referencing the pentest skill path
